title: Power Wheelchair Billing Dispute — Excellent Handling
scenario: Customer disputes an invoice charge. Agent listens, investigates, owns the error, and issues a correction.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good afternoon, thank you for calling UMS, this is Maria. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I just got a bill for six hundred dollars for my wheelchair. I thought Medicare covered everything.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I completely understand that's concerning. Let me take a close look at your statement. Can you read me the invoice number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. I'm pulling it up now. I can see what happened — your supplemental insurance wasn't billed for the coinsurance portion. That's our mistake on our end. I'm going to file the claim with them right now and issue a hold on the balance. You won't owe anything in the meantime.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Oh thank goodness. I was so worried.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm really sorry for the stress this caused. I'm going to personally follow up on this in five business days to make sure it's resolved. Is the number on your account the best way to reach you?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. I'll reach out Wednesday with an update. Is there anything else I can do for you today?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, you've been wonderful, thank you.
